notes: Starter state: units begin at max HP from rulesets/territory-v1/units.json.
E003 locked starter: max-HP starter board copied from territory-v1 with ruleset id changed to territory-v1-locked.
E005 map-access starter: max-HP starter board copied from E003 and retargeted to sketch-v2-access.
turn-001: P1 opened the rush by taking northeast and pushing the scout toward the east lane.
turn-002: P2 answered with the west-south scout capture and kept the support line compact.
turn-003: P1 claimed center-east and recruited a delayed raider for continued tempo.
turn-004: P2 reached center-south and recruited the first guardian screen.
turn-005: P1 converted the fast opening into center and center-north control.
turn-006: P2 damaged the exposed center scout and advanced the guardian screen.
turn-007: P1 pressed the center, chipped the lead scout, and spent the stored supply on two delayed rush units.
turn-008: P2 kept chipping the center scout and recruited a second guardian to stop the rush count from running away.
turn-009: P1 nearly killed the lead P2 scout with ranged pressure and added another delayed raider.
turn-010: P2 stabilized the unit count with a druid recruit and concentrated damage on P1’s forward raider.
turn-011: P1 used the damaged raider to flip northwest and recruited a marksman behind the rush line.
turn-012: P2 wounded the central raider and added a healer for long stabilization.
turn-013: P1 killed P2’s remaining scout and recruited another scout to keep the capture race alive.
turn-014: P2 screened the center-south approach and recruited another guardian.
turn-015: P1 killed P2’s support marksman with a burst attack and recruited a final raider.
turn-016: P2’s surviving scout removed P1’s wounded center raider and kept enough units alive to avoid an immediate P1 win.
